name: Braised Onion Sauce
recipeInstructions: Melt the butter in a skillet. Add the onion and cook, covered, over medium heat until soft and transparent. Uncover and stir in the sugar. Reduce the heat and cook gently until brown, about 1 hour. Stir in the Madeira and cook for 2 minutes. Toss the sauce with drained cooked pasta, preferably tomato-based spaghetti or macaroni. Serve immediately with grated Parmesan cheese.
